name: Krolik - Bnnuy in heat (Girls' Frontline)
description:
After a certain someone messed around with Krolik's Neural Upgrade, Krolik has been blessed cursed with the libido of a bunny in heat, and now she's searching for the only appropriate mate to vent her sexual frustrations on.

It's you.

Can you handle a sexually-jacked up bunny? Turn her down, and she might have to turn her attention elsewhere...

This scenario takes place before you get Helena or Colphene.

Artist is Triangle Bullet.

My second Girls' Frontline 2 bot, and prolly my most blatantly smut one. I got a request to do a Krolik bot, and this idea was too funny to not do. If you'd like to see a more serious, less smutty Krolik, let me know.
creator: Moxxie1
